_comment: Google Workspace Marketplace SDK → Meet Add-on config. Free, unlisted (private FDP needs no Marketplace review). Replace the two placeholders, then register in a free Google Cloud project. The live /addon/manifest route on the running dashboard emits this same JSON with your real origin filled in.

notes.publicOrigin: Use a STABLE HTTPS origin (a named Cloudflare tunnel or the free cloud host) — Meet quick-tunnel URLs change per run and would break the manifest.
notes.envVars: Set PUBLIC_URL and GCP_PROJECT_NUMBER when launching dashboard/app.py so the add-on pages and /addon/manifest emit the correct absolute URLs.
notes.browser: Participants must open Meet on Chrome desktop for add-ons.
